functions.name: welib.vortilib.particles.initialization.init_from_mesh
documentation: if ('mesh_GridPoints_OmegaAnalytical') == (InitParams.Method):
mesh = InitParams.mesh
# Putting particles at the middle of the cell
cell_volumes = mesh.getCellVolumes()
PP = mesh.getFlatGridPoints()
nPart = PP.shape[1-1]
Part.reset(nPart)
Part.setP(PP)
# Computing Omega from analytical function and setting particle intensities
if Algo.nDim == 2:
Omega = InitParams.fOmega(Part.P(:,1),Part.P(:,2))
else:
Omega = InitParams.fOmega(Part.P(:,1),Part.P(:,2),Part.P(:,3))
Part.setIntensity(np.multiply(Omega,cell_volumes))
Part.setVolume(cell_volumes)
if ('mesh_CellCenterQuasiRandom_OmegaAnalytical') == (InitParams.Method):
mesh = InitParams.mesh
if not mesh.bRegular :
raise Exception('Random init with non regular grid not suported')
# Putting particles at the middle of the cell
cell_volume = mesh.getCellVolume()
cell_Centers = mesh.getFlatCellCenters()
nPart = cell_Centers.shape[1-1]
# rand is between [0 1] we transform it between -1/2h 1/2h
RandP = np.zeros((nPart,Algo.nDim))
for id in np.arange(1,Algo.nDim+1).reshape(-1):
RandP[:,id-1] = (np.random.rand(nPart,1) - 1 / 2) * mesh.dCell(id)
# Setting Particles position
Part.reset(nPart)
Part.setP(cell_Centers + RandP)
# Computing Omega from analytical function and setting particle intensities
if Algo.nDim == 2:
Omega = InitParams.fOmega(Part.P(:,1),Part.P(:,2))
else:
Omega = InitParams.fOmega(Part.P(:,1),Part.P(:,2),Part.P(:,3))
Part.setIntensity(Omega * cell_volume)
Part.setVolume(cell_volume)

functions.name: welib.vortilib.elements.VortexDoublet.doublet_u
documentation:
Velocity field induced by one doublet located at x0 with vector intensity m
     u = 1/(4pi)       *( 3* r * m.r/|r|**5 - m/|r|**3)
     u = 1/(4pi |r|**3)*( 3* r * m.r/|r|**2 - m)
Xcp, Ycp, Zcp: Cartesian coordinates of control points
--- Point doublet

functions.name: welib.vortilib.elements.VortexDoublet.doublet_u_polar
documentation:
Velocity field induced by one doublet located at z0 on the z axis with vector intensity (0,0,mz)
     ur = 3 m_z /(4pi) r (z-z0) / |r|**5
     uz =   m_z /(4pi) (3 (z-z0)**2 / |r|**5 -1/|r|**3)
Control points defined by polar coordinates `rcp` and `zcp`.

functions.name: welib.vortilib.elements.VortexDoublet.doublet_line_polar_u_num
documentation:
Velocity field induced by a doublet line (on the z axis) of intensity `dmz_dz`.
Control points defined by polar coordinates `rcp` and `zcp`.
The line goes from `z0` to `zmax`.
Numerical integration is used with `nQuad` quadrature points.
--- Line doublet

functions.name: welib.vortilib.elements.VortexDoublet.doublet_line_polar_u
documentation:
Velocity field induced by a semi-infinite doublet line (on the z axis) of intensity `dmz_dz`
Control points defined by polar coordinates `rcp` and `zcp`.

 \int  1/(r^2 + (z-x)^2 )^(3/2) dx
 \int  1/(r^2 + (z-x)^2 )^(5/2) dx

functions.name: welib.vortilib.elements.VortexDoublet.doublet_line_u
documentation:
Velocity field induced by a double line, of intensity [0,0,dmz/dz]
The line is defined by the coordinates (x=mz,y=0,z)
By default a semi-infinite line is assumed (L=np.inf)
INPUTS:
   Xcp,Ycp,Zcp: vector or matrix of control points Cartesian Coordinates
   m          : tangent of the skew angle (0 for a straight line along z)
   L          : length of the line (on the z axis!), True length is L*\sqrt{1+m^2}

functions.name: welib.vortilib.elements.VortexDoublet.doublet_line_u_num
documentation:
Velocity field induced by a double line, of intensity [0,0,dmz/dz]
The line is defined by the coordinates (x=mz,y=0,z)

INPUTS:
   Xcp,Ycp,Zcp: vector or matrix of control points Cartesian Coordinates
   m          : tangent of the skew angle (0 for a straight line along z)

functions.name: welib.vortilib.elements.VortexDoublet.I30
documentation: --- Integrals useful for vortex doublet
--- Main Results for semi-infinite line
a = sqrt(x^2 + y^2 + z^2)
b = m x + z
c = sqrt(m^2+1)
--- INTEGRALS WRITTEN ALONG X AND USING PROPER a b c:   a^2 = x^2 + y^2 + z^2, b=my+x , c^2 = (1+m^2)
indef         = (b - c^2 x)/((b^2 - a^2 c^2) sqrt(a^2 + x (-2 b + c^2 x)))
indef_(b=ac)  =  1/(2 c (a - c x)^2) =  s/(2 c (a -sc x)^2) s==1
indef_(b=-ac) = -1/(4 c (a + c x)^4) =  s/(4 c (a -sc x)^4) s==-1  b=-ac
indef_(b= ac) =  1/(4 c (a - c x)^4) =  s/(4 c (a -sc x)^4) s==1

functions.name: welib.vortilib.elements.VortexDoublet._integrals_DL_finite
documentation:
Compute integrals values for doublet line of finite length
returns: I30,  3*I50, 3*I51, 3*I52
--- FINITE LENGTH DOUBLET LINE
